'''Tregar ''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who controlled [[Merel sector/Legends|Merel sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was known as an extremely competent man, and was considered to be too influential to be promoted to the rank of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]]. Tregar developed a good working relationship with the [[Ragnar Syndicate]], a group of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. Tregar often employed the Ragnar Syndicate to take out suspected cells of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] supporters in his sector.
